query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `predictive_scores` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `leadId` int NOT NULL,
  `score` decimal(5,2) NOT NULL COMMENT '0.00 - 100.00',
  `scoreLabel` enum('hot','warm','cold') NOT NULL,
  `factors` text,
  `modelVersion` varchar(32) DEFAULT 'v1',
  `calculatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_predictive_userId` (`userId`),
  KEY `idx_predictive_leadId` (`leadId`)
);

ALTER TABLE `email_sequence_steps`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `stepType` enum('email','linkedin_connect','linkedin_message','call') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'email',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `linkedinNote` text;

  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `leadId` int NOT NULL,
  `score` decimal(5,2) NOT NULL COMMENT '0.00 - 100.00',
  `scoreLabel` enum('hot','warm','cold') NOT NULL,
  `factors` text,

  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_predictive_userId` (`userId`),

ALTER TABLE `email_sequence_steps`
